en.text: them which are of the house
should be made of none effect
the things that are freely given
. judgeth: or, discerneth judged: or, discerned
? divisions: or, factions as men: Gr. according to man?
. it shall be: Gr. it is
. know: or, I am not conscious of any fault
, I have in a figure transferred
of them which are puffed up
things that pertain to this life
of things pertaining to this life
to judge who are least esteemed
. Meats: not flesh only, but food of any kind
for the things that belong to
: that belong: Gr. of the Lord
she pass the flower of her age
he that giveth her in marriage
of those things that are offered in sacrifice unto idols
a thing offered unto an idol
. are we the better: or, have we the more are we the worse: or, have we the less
those things which are offered to idols
of the gospel is committed unto me
To them that are without law
such as is common to man
which is offered in sacrifice to idols
. power: that is a covering in sign that she is under the power of her husband
; in the truth: or, with the truth
. thought: or, reasoned put away: Gr. vanish away
. of spiritual gifts: Gr. of spirits
by my voice I might teach
. men: Gr. perfect, or, of a ripe age
. two: by two or three sentences separately
they are commanded to be under obedience
. keep: or, hold fast what: Gr. by what speech
of one born out of due time
. after: or, to speak after the manner of men
